name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Compromise Activities
notes: Edit this BB to include categories that are considered the be part of events seen during typical compromises.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Compromise Activities on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following DOS.Brute force login, Exploit, Malware.Malicious Software, Malware.Virus Detected, Potential Exploit, Suspicious Activity.Executable Code Detected, Suspicious Activity.IDS Evasion
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Compromise Activities on events which are detected by the undefined system
